home.loginErrorHint: Common causes: (1) Redirect URL below must be in the same Discord application that provides your Client ID & Secret. (2) NEXTAUTH_URL in .env.local must match exactly (no trailing slash). (3) NEXTAUTH_SECRET must be set. (4) After restarting "npm run dev", try logging in again and check the terminal for debug output with the exact error.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.guildsEmpty: No guilds. Set up the bot on a Discord server.
dashboard.noRaiderRights: You do not have Raider rights in this guild (yet)

profile.title: My Profile
profile.themeDescription: Display mode is toggled in the topbar (light/dark); stored in profile and cookie.
profile.weekFocusHint: This setting has no effect; it only serves as a guide when planning raids.
profile.charactersDescription: Characters with name, guild, spec and off-spec.
profile.lootTableDescription: Loot received per guild and dungeon.

guildManagement.title: Guild Management
guildManagement.forbidden: You do not have permission for guild management. Only RaidFlow Guild Masters can access this page.
guildManagement.raidGroupsDescription: Create, edit or delete raid groups. The Discord role "Raidflowgroup-<Name>" will be created.
guildManagement.membersDescription: Guild members and their raid group assignment.
guildManagement.readChannelsDescription: Load Discord channels and select which are allowed for raid threads.
guildManagement.allowedChannelsDescription: Channels where the bot may create raid threads. When creating a raid, one of these can be selected.
guildManagement.noChannelsFetched: No channels loaded yet. Click "Load channels from Discord".
guildManagement.characterAllowedInGroup: Allowed in raid group (for raid filters)
guildManagement.characterAllowedErrorLast: At least one character per user must remain allowed in the raid group.
guildManagement.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard changes and leave the page?

admin.title: Admin
admin.forbidden: You do not have permission for the admin area. Only application admins can access this page.
admin.guildsSectionDescription: Delete guilds (including associated raids, signups, role data).
admin.deleteGuildConfirm: Permanently delete guild "{name}" and all associated data?
admin.whitelistBlacklistDescription: Whitelist: Only allowed servers use RaidFlow. Blacklist: Exclude specific servers. Only one option active.
admin.serverWhitelist: Allowed server IDs (Discord guild ID, one per line)
admin.serverBlacklist: Excluded server IDs (Discord guild ID, one per line)
admin.adminsSectionDescription: Add or remove admins (by Discord ID). Owner cannot be removed.
admin.discordBotInviteDescription: When inactive, the Discord bot invite functions are grayed out and non-functional.
admin.maintenanceDescription: When maintenance mode is active, users see only the message below after login. Admins/Owners have full access. The text is also shown on the landing page. When maintenance mode is off, the text appears as a status message below the topbar and on the landing page.
